title: Metrics Types
description: Graph health metrics and traceability types computed by the Rust backend from the artifact graph data structure.

GraphHealth.title: GraphHealth
GraphHealth.description: Graph-theoretic health metrics for the artifact graph. All values are computed purely in Rust from the graph data structure.

total_nodes.description: Total number of primary nodes (excluding alias nodes in org mode).

component_count.description: Number of weakly-connected components. 1 means fully connected.

largest_component_ratio.description: Largest connected component size / total nodes (0.0–1.0).

orphan_count.description: Nodes with zero incoming references (excluding doc artifacts).

orphan_percentage.description: orphan_count / total_nodes * 100, rounded to 1 decimal place.

avg_degree.description: Average number of relationships per node (edges * 2 / nodes).

pillar_traceability.description: Percentage of non-doc nodes that can trace a path to a pillar artifact (0.0–100.0).

bidirectionality_ratio.description: Ratio of typed relationship edges that have their inverse present (0.0–1.0).

broken_ref_count.description: Number of broken references (target not in graph).

HealthSnapshot.title: HealthSnapshot
HealthSnapshot.description: A point-in-time snapshot of graph health metrics stored in SQLite.

project_id.description: Foreign key to the projects table.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this snapshot was recorded.

error_count.description: Number of Error-severity integrity findings at snapshot time.

warning_count.description: Number of Warning-severity integrity findings at snapshot time.

AncestryNode.title: AncestryNode
AncestryNode.description: A single node in an ancestry chain, ordered from the query artifact up to the pillar or vision root.

relationship.description: The relationship type connecting this node to the next node upward. Empty string for the terminal (pillar/vision) node.

AncestryChain.title: AncestryChain
AncestryChain.description: An ordered path from the query artifact to a pillar or vision root.

path.description: Ordered from current artifact (index 0) to pillar/vision root (last).

TracedArtifact.title: TracedArtifact
TracedArtifact.description: A downstream artifact with its BFS distance from the query artifact.

depth.description: BFS hops from the query artifact.

TraceabilityResult.title: TraceabilityResult
TraceabilityResult.description: Full traceability result for a single artifact.

ancestry_chains.description: All paths from the artifact upward to any pillar or vision.

descendants.description: All downstream artifacts with their BFS distance.

siblings.description: IDs of artifacts that share at least one direct parent with this artifact.

impact_radius.description: Count of distinct descendants within 2 hops.

disconnected.description: True when no path exists to any pillar or vision artifact.
